About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC) is a government agency responsible for conducting recruitment exams for various government posts in Uttar Pradesh, India.

The UPSSSC aims to provide a fair and transparent recruitment process for government jobs in the state.

About the Programme

The UPSSSC Lower PCS Eligibility Result 2026 is a recruitment exam for graduate candidates to fill 2587 posts in various government departments in Uttar Pradesh, India.

The programme aims to provide employment opportunities to eligible candidates and to strengthen the government workforce in the state.
